title: halimium × martrei
intro: Halimium × martrei is a hybrid plant species resulting from the cross between the rockrose (Halimium calycinum) and the shrubby rockrose (Cistus ladanifer). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antimicrobial agent. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including the potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and to protect against certain types of cancer. Halimium × martrei can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and salves, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
